modes.purpose: discovery — explore options before any design exists
modes.default_when: phase intent of feature/refactor workflows; standalone for new ideas

modes.purpose: convergence — interrogate an existing plan branch by branch
modes.default_when: phase plan after plan-writing produced the [PLAN] markdown

modes.purpose: sharpen + challenge against CONTEXT.md and docs/adr/
modes.default_when: phase plan when CONTEXT.md has rich vocabulary or ADRs touch the area

human_approval_required_for: context_term_modification (mode domain, when changing existing definition)
